items.text: Send a thirsty emoji to the last person you texted — show the group.
Let the group pick a word you must whisper seductively.
Do your best "I am the drama" walk across the room.
Swap phones with someone for 30 seconds — no scrolling DMs.
Post a vague thirsty story — delete after the round.
Let someone rewrite your dating bio out loud.
Give your most convincing fake moan for two seconds.
Text "thinking about you" to someone the group chooses (or chicken out).
Do 10 squats while maintaining eye contact with the host.
Read your last three emojis used like they are a poem.
Let the group pose you for a thirst trap photo — keep it PG-13.
Serenade the player on your left for fifteen seconds.
Swap an item of clothing with someone for one round.
Do your best impression of someone in the room flirting.
Hold a plank while saying three things you find hot.
Let the group pick a pickup line — deliver it to the camera.
Show the last photo you took without explaining it.
Give someone a compliment that sounds like a threat.
Narrate your morning routine like a romance novel.
Do a slow-motion hair flip or hat tip.
Let the group rename you for the rest of the night.
Demonstrate your signature dance move from the club.
Say something nice about each player — no repeats.
Act out your last crush meeting you in a movie.
Share your most-used emoji and defend it.
Let someone tickle your ego — brag for twenty seconds.
Pretend you are on a dating show intro — sell yourself.
Do push-ups or wall sits until the timer ends.
Whisper a secret to the player across from you.
Let the group choose your next drink or snack.
Strike three poses the group calls out — fast.
Text your crush a single fire emoji on camera — or chicken out.
Read your most recent text out loud in your most dramatic voice.
Show the group your most-used emoji and tell its real story.
Do your best seductive wink at the camera three times.
Let the group write your next status — and read it aloud.
Give a 15-second TED talk on why you're a catch.
Show the last selfie in your camera roll with zero context.
Do your most convincing fake laugh until someone else laughs.
Pick a player and serenade them through the camera for 10 seconds.
Confess your most recent guilty-pleasure song and play 5 seconds of it.
Do a runway walk across your room on camera.
Let the group dare you to call (not text) someone right now.
Reenact your worst flirting attempt for the group.
Show your screen time and explain your most-used app.
Speak only in pickup lines until your next turn.
Let the player to your left choose an emoji you must text someone.
Do your best impression of a player flirting — let them guess who.
Give the camera bedroom eyes for a full 10 seconds without laughing.
Read your last DM out loud in a soap-opera voice.
